Investigation complete. The node pool hit memory pressure at 13:58, the kubelet
began evicting pods, and orders-svc lost 4 of 6 replicas, which produced the
error spike. Mitigation: added a node and raised the eviction threshold. The
cluster has been stable since. Root cause: infrastructure — node memory
pressure and pod eviction. Evidence: node-memory panel 13:55-14:10, eviction
events in kubelet logs.
